description: This Rust source file implements functionality to generate and display a tree view of manifest data from a file, including functions to populate nodes, walk the tree, and produce a string representation of the manifest structure. It also contains a test for the tree generation.

methods.name: populate_node
methods.description: Recursively populates a tree structure with manifest assertions and ingredients, creating nodes for each element.

methods.name: walk_tree
methods.description: Traverses the Arena tree structure starting from a token and constructs a hierarchical Tree representation.

methods.name: tree
methods.description: Main function that reads a file, extracts manifest data, and produces a string representation of the manifest tree.
